form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a one length third (16.45) over 300m at this track and making it two placings on end. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Well supported here last start but failed to deliver, finishing finished 6th on April 3 over 400m at Geelong behind Mr. Kia Ora beaten 6 lengths (23.29) in a Grade 5. Placed two back at Geelong. Has clocked a scorching 16.41 here at this trip. Leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and fell on first turn.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 350m. Last start finished 2nd in a Free For All on April 1 over 390m at Ballarat behind Croydon beaten 2.25 lengths (22.08). Yet to be beaten in two starts out of this draw. Sure to go well.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.10) at this track in a Free For All, finishing sixth and beaten 5 lengths. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from two starts. Looks a place chance at best.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.23) at Geelong in a Grade 5, finishing eighth and beaten 11 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and five places from 12 starts. Others appear better placed.

form.formComment: Has been in the minors the last two, the latest showing strong pace early but gathered in and finished a neck second over 300m this track in 16.76. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Worth including.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance to score by 1.5 lengths in a Grade 4/5 last start at this track, clocking a slick 16.77 over the 300m trip. Should be in this for a long way.
